description: Configuration keywords for FLAC plot item types created via 'plot item create <type>'. Item types and their keyword sets are binary-validated against FLAC2D 9.0.

items.name: zone
items.description: Continuum zone visualization. Use 'contour <attribute>' for scalar/vector field maps, 'label <type>' for categorical labeling (group/state/model/property), and 'color <Color>' for flat coloring.
items.common_use: Visualize continuum grid results: stress, displacement, pore pressure, temperature, model state, groups.

items.name: gridpoint-fix
items.description: Gridpoint fix-condition markers (velocity, pore-pressure, temperature fixity).
items.common_use: Show where boundary fixities are applied. For gridpoint field values (displacement, velocity, pp, temperature) use 'plot item create zone contour <attribute>' instead — zone contour interpolates from gridpoint data.

items.name: structure
items.description: Structural-element visualization. Types: structure-beam, structure-cable, structure-liner, structure-pile (beam-family — share keyword set), structure-vector (vector field at nodes).
items.common_use: Visualize structural-element groups, forces/moments/axial via 'contour <attribute>', categorical via 'label <type>'.

shared_keywords.description: Top-level keywords accepted by most FLAC plot item types (validated against FLAC2D 9.0).

notes: Plot-item keywords are appended after the item type.
Some compound settings are easier to apply with 'plot item modify <id> ...' after creating the item.
Probe the binary live with 'plot item create <type> ?' to see the full keyword set for any type, and 'plot item create <type> <kw> ?' to drill into a keyword.
Other plot item types (zone-vector, zone-tensor, zone-face, pp-fix, struct-node-fix, etc.) are accepted by FLAC2D 9.0 but not yet documented here.
